author: doll-agent
content: Audit complete. PolynomialF32 (power basis) already ships in power_f32.rs — issue body's 'no f32 support exists' was stale. Filed five concrete sibling-type follow-ups (#725 ChebyshevF32, #726 HermiteF32, #727 HermiteEF32, #728 LegendreF32, #729 LaguerreF32) plus #730 (complex coefficients) and #731 (Poly<T> genericization as the alternative path). Closing #475 — work is tracked in concrete follow-ups.
